trench.detail: Not Signed | "Project" is the equivelent to reverted backward to the previous stage. E-Mail notification is sent to the Sales Rep with message "Opportunity Name - Project has been reverter due to no signed partner agreement being located. Please resubmit when you have obtained a signed agreement" | *
